summary.work_completed: Researched similar org repos, market landscape, and produced technical recommendations for web-based LEGO builder.
key_findings: Found one related empty repo in org: sreenivasmrpivot/lego-builder
Market includes LDD, BrickLink Studio, and web-based options
Recommended React + Three.js stack with React Three Fiber
